triggers.name: prevent_audit_delete
triggers.sql: CREATE TRIGGER prevent_audit_delete BEFORE DELETE ON audit_logs BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'audit_logs is immutable'); END

triggers.name: prevent_audit_update
triggers.sql: CREATE TRIGGER prevent_audit_update BEFORE UPDATE ON audit_logs BEGIN SELECT RAISE(ABORT, 'audit_logs is immutable'); END
